headline: How The Aon (AON) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Price Targets
summary: Price targets on Aon are being nudged around the edges, with some firms trimming estimates by up to US$57 while others cluster new targets in the mid to high US$300s and low US$400s. These moves are tied to how different analysts weigh softer P&C pricing, AI related cost pressure, and the importance of underwriting quality and margins. Read on to see what these shifts mean for you and how to track the way the Aon story is evolving. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story...

headline: Assessing Aon (AON) Valuation As Recent Share Price Moves Clash With Longer Term Returns
summary: Event context and recent share performance Aon (AON) has attracted renewed attention after recent share price moves, with the stock around $327 and mixed return patterns over the past year that include a modest month gain and a negative past 3 months. For long term holders, the contrast between the negative 1 year total return and positive multi year total returns adds context to Aon’s current valuation and sets the stage for a closer look at its business fundamentals. See our latest analysis...
